title: microlonchus salmanticus
intro:
Microlonchus salmanticus is a type of plant, however I couldn't find any information on it.

However I can tell you about the plant 'Salmacis' or 'Salmacis plant' is a plant  known to have medicinal properties, but I could not confirm the Microlonchus salmanticus plant specifically. 
Salmacis is a plant that has been used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including treating various skin conditions and promoting wound healing. 
The herbal preparations of Salmacis, such as infusions and salves, are sometimes used topically to aid in skin regeneration and tissue repair, but more information is needed to confirm this.
